characters.appearance: Young adult Indian woman, slim build, medium complexion. Straight dark brown hair parted in the middle. Prominent nose and defined jawline.
characters.wardrobe: Brown long-sleeved collared shirt. Small cross earrings.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मुझे लगता था मेरी English काफी अच्छी है, until I tried this app. [I thought my English was pretty good, until I tried this app.]
Character A says: कुछ महीने पहले मैंने Supernova का AI speaking test try किया. [A few months ago, I tried Supernova's AI speaking test.]
Character A says: First time मेरा score सिर्फ 40% आया. [The first time, my score was only 40%.]
Character A says: How can I help you? [How can I help you?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by challenging their assumption about their English proficiency.
- Introduces the app's diagnostic feature (AI speaking test) and establishes a relatable baseline score.
- Demonstrates a real-world, practical phrase being tested.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: ENGLISH APP UNTIL I TRIED SUPERNOVA AI TEST 40% Grading your pronunciation... 40% Your Speaking Score Maya 40% Practice AI Tutor Let's begin! Record yourself saying the phrase below. How can I help you? 40%

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मुझे realize ही नहीं हुआ कि मैं pronunciation में कहाँ गलती कर रही थी. [I never realized where I was making mistakes in my pronunciation.]
Character A says: Supernova के AI tutor ने मुझे मेरी mistakes बताईं, and I've been practicing every single night, सोने से पहले सिर्फ 10 minutes. [Supernova's AI tutor showed me my mistakes, and I've been practicing every single night, just 10 minutes before bed.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the problem of not knowing one's own mistakes.
- Positions the AI tutor as a helpful, non-judgmental guide.
- Emphasizes that the solution requires only a small, manageable daily commitment (10 minutes).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: MISTAKES AI TUTOR PRACTICING EVERY NIGHT 10 MINS Pronunciation 40 Needs Work Fluency 50 Okay Word stress We found 2 words where you're stressing the wrong syllable. Daily Practice AI Tutor

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: आज मैं फिर से test ले रही हूँ, let's see how I do. [Today I'm taking the test again, let's see how I do.]
Character A says: Opportunity. [Opportunity.]
Character A says: Confident. [Confident.]
Character A says: 90%! [90%!]
Character A says: Supernova app download करो और अपना speaking score check करो. [Download the Supernova app and check your speaking score.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides the emotional payoff of seeing tangible improvement.
- Demonstrates the practice of professional, confidence-building vocabulary.
- Delivers a clear, direct Call to Action to download the app and test their own score.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: TESTING AGAIN HOW I DO 90% DOWNLOAD SUPERNOVA CHECK YOUR SCORE Practice AI Tutor Let's start! Tap the button below and say the word. opportunity confident Your Speaking Score Maya 90% Supernova Grading your fluency... 95% 100%
